---
title: "Critical Appraisal: CASP RCT Checklist"
subtitle: "[Study Reference]"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    self-contained: true
---

# Study Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Title** | |
| **Authors** | |
| **Year** | |
| **Journal** | |
| **DOI** | |
| **Study Design** | Randomized Controlled Trial |
| **Appraiser** | |
| **Appraisal Date** | |

# CASP RCT Checklist

## Section A: Are the Results Valid?

### 1. Did the trial address a clearly focused research question?

**Consider**: Population, Intervention, Comparator, Outcomes (PICO)

**Evidence from paper**:

> [Extract relevant text here]

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Can't tell  ☐ No

**Reasoning**:

---

### 2. Was the assignment of participants to treatments randomized?

**Consider**: How was randomization done? Was it concealed from researchers?

**Evidence from paper**:

> [Extract relevant text here]

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Can't tell  ☐ No

**Reasoning**:

---

### 3. Were all participants who entered the trial accounted for at its conclusion?

**Consider**: Were they analyzed in the groups they were randomized to (intention-to-treat)? Were losses to follow-up reported and explained?

**Evidence from paper**:

> [Extract relevant text here]

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Can't tell  ☐ No

**Reasoning**:

---

### 4. Were participants, investigators, and outcome assessors blind to treatment allocation?

**Consider**: Was blinding feasible? Was it done?

**Evidence from paper**:

> [Extract relevant text here]

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Can't tell  ☐ No

**Reasoning**:

---

### 5. Were the groups similar at the start of the trial?

**Consider**: Baseline characteristics, confounders

**Evidence from paper**:

> [Extract relevant text here]

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Can't tell  ☐ No

**Reasoning**:

---

### 6. Aside from the experimental intervention, were the groups treated equally?

**Consider**: Co-interventions, compliance

**Evidence from paper**:

> [Extract relevant text here]

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Can't tell  ☐ No

**Reasoning**:

---

## Section B: What Are the Results?

### 7. How large was the treatment effect?

**Consider**: Effect size, confidence intervals

**Evidence from paper**:

> [Extract relevant text here]

**Summary**:

---

### 8. How precise was the estimate of the treatment effect?

**Consider**: Confidence intervals, p-values

**Evidence from paper**:

> [Extract relevant text here]

**Summary**:

---

## Section C: Will the Results Help Locally?

### 9. Can the results be applied to the local population or your review question?

**Consider**: Population differences, setting

**Evidence from paper**:

> [Extract relevant text here]

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Can't tell  ☐ No

**Reasoning**:

---

### 10. Were all clinically important outcomes considered?

**Consider**: Were there outcomes you would have liked to see?

**Evidence from paper**:

> [Extract relevant text here]

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Can't tell  ☐ No

**Reasoning**:

---

### 11. Are the benefits worth the harms and costs?

**Consider**: Even if not addressed by the trial, what do you think?

**Rating**: ☐ Yes  ☐ Can't tell  ☐ No

**Reasoning**:

---

# Overall Assessment

| Domain | Rating |
|--------|--------|
| Internal validity (Q1–Q6) | |
| Results (Q7–Q8) | |
| Applicability (Q9–Q11) | |

**Overall quality summary**:

**Notes on applicability to review question**:
